last_run.summary: Completed Stage 1 web production prep: standardized ledger, aligned CI (APP_URL and branches), verified Node deployment mode due to shutdown API route, added SEO metadata and a local-only privacy disclaimer, and authored DEPLOYMENT.md.

validation.summary: All validation commands passed. Next.js standard build verified. Playwright visual tests passed on chromium. Visual updates applied for the new privacy footer text.

open_items: Final domain name for public release
Global vs China mainland deployment routing
Whether ICP or Chinese cloud hosting is required
Whether analytics (e.g., Google Analytics / Vercel Analytics) are allowed
Whether product remains strictly local-only for this release (currently assumed yes)

validation.summary: Final sequential validation passed. lint and build passed. visual snapshots were intentionally updated for shared frame/font/template changes, then npm run test:visual passed with 11/11. npm run test:export-parity passed with 8/8 template-language combinations, including main preview, export screen preview, mocked print trigger after data-export-ready, and print media checks. An earlier parallel visual run hit an EADDRINUSE webServer collision and was rerun sequentially. The in-app Browser plugin local smoke attempt timed out, so the completed browser-grade acceptance evidence is the Playwright Chromium matrix.
